values.description: Backend server base URL. Change port if needed.
Your BillSoft account email — update before running login
Your BillSoft account password — update before running login
JWT token — auto-populated by the Login request (0.2)
Current order ID — auto-populated by Create Session requests (1.x)
HDFC hosted payment URL — auto-populated by Create Session. Copy this and open in browser.
Current user ID — auto-populated by Get Profile (0.3)
Last successfully activated plan — auto-populated by Verify (2.1)
HDFC Sandbox Client ID — must be hdfcmaster in sandbox

info.name: BillSoft HDFC — Local Dev
info.description:
Environment variables for BillSoft HDFC SmartGateway payment testing.

Setup:
1. Update user_email and user_password with your BillSoft credentials
2. Select this environment in Postman
3. Run request 0.2 (Login) — auth_token will be auto-filled
4. Run any Create Session request — order_id will be auto-filled
